Title: Geek Bar Pulse — 15,000 Puffs
Body (HTML):
World's First Full Screen Disposable

The Geek Bar Pulse redefines disposable vaping with its iconic full-screen display showing real-time battery and e-juice levels. Powered by a dual mesh coil dual core system at 20W output, every puff delivers rich, consistent flavor from start to finish.

  • Puff Count: Up to 15,000 puffs
  • Nicotine Strength: 5% (50mg)
  • Coil: Dual Mesh Coil — Dual Core
  • Output Power: 20W
  • Display: Full screen — battery & e-juice indicator
  • Charging: USB-C rechargeable
  • Mouthpiece: Transparent ergonomic shell

WARNING: This product contains nicotine, which is an addictive chemical. Not for sale to persons under 21.

Title: Geek Bar Pulse X — 25,000 Puffs
Body (HTML):

The Geek Bar Pulse X pushes disposable technology to its limit. Featuring a futuristic 3D curved Star UI screen with lighting controls and AI Power Adjustment that automatically balances airflow and output with one-button customization. Quick Charge technology delivers 80% battery in just 20 minutes.

  • Puff Count: 25,000 (Regular) / 15,000 (Pulse Mode)

Title: Lost Mary MT35000 Turbo — 35,000 Puffs
Body (HTML):
Next-Level Disposable with Dual-Mode Technology

The Lost Mary MT35000 Turbo is engineered for the long haul. With two distinct vaping modes — Smooth Mode for up to 35,000 puffs or Turbo Mode for an intense 20,000-puff experience — this device adapts to your style. The integrated screen displays battery status, e-liquid level, and your active mode at a glance. Rechargeable via USB-C in as little as 10 minutes.

  • Puff Count: 35,000 (Smooth Mode) / 20,000 (Turbo Mode)
  • Nicotine Strength: 5% (50mg)
  • E-liquid Capacity: 18ml
  • Battery: 1000mAh rechargeable
  • Coil: Dual Mesh Coil
  • Display: Integrated screen — battery, e-juice & mode indicator
  • Charging: USB-C (~10 min for a full day)

WARNING: This product contains nicotine, which is an addictive chemical. Not for sale to persons under 21.
